title: Rotterdam Gold
text:
Project Overview
Evaluate longitudinal survey data to understand the impact of school interventions (‚Äúfocus‚Äù vs.¬Ý‚Äúcontrol‚Äù schools) on student well-being and coping strategies across four waves.






Publication



Rotterdam Goud:¬ÝEindrapport Pilot Rotterdams Goud: Wijzen van leren en sociaal-emotioneel welbevinden. Dijkstra, K., & el Ghani, A., (2024).

title: FAIR-play
text:
Project Overview
The FAIRPLAY project, in collaboration with Nederlands Jeugdinstituut (NJi) and several top European football clubs, investigates the societal impact of football in fostering resilience and life skills in youth. Supported by an Erasmus+ grant, this three-year initiative works with Feyenoord, Charlton Athletic, Werder Bremen, Inter Milan, and Hibernian to develop and implement pedagogical strategies for coaches and youth workers. The project aims to empower young people, particularly in urban environments, by using football as a tool to teach resilience and life skills, culminating in a training manual for best practices and evidence-based approaches.


Results







Research Publication



Resilience among youth in soccer. Dijkstra, K., & el Ghani, A., (2024).

Abdelkarim el Ghani is a Statistical Data Analyst at 
    Erasmus University Rotterdam.

    cutting-edge techniques to drive innovation.

    Converting complex datasets into actionable insights using advanced statistical techniques.
  
  
    Investigating the intricacies of brain function to better understand human behavior.
  
  
    Advocating for transparency and collaboration in scientific research.
  
  
    Developing robust, modern websites and interactive apps with the latest technologies.
  
  
    Crafting clear and compelling visual representations that transform data into meaningful stories.
  
  
    Implementing systematic workflows ensuring every finding is verifiable and impactful.
